meaning: v.(使)流通,(使)运行,(使)循环,(使)传播
examples: Leave a gap at the top and bottom so air can circulate.
Rumours began to circulate about his financial problems.
Rumours were already beginning to circulate that the project might have to be abandoned.
Officials now point out that merely to circulate such messages without permission is illegal.
Even if it is, it will continue to circulate, thanks to Indonesia's photocopy culture.
